description: Order of payment issued by Abū Zikrī Kohen to his banker, Abū l-Khayr Khiyyār, instructing him to pay for grapes one dinar and one half and one third in cash. Dated Av 1451 (= 1140 CE). (Information from CUDL)
tags: Abu Zikri Kohen, order of payment, cheque
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
